title: aster setiger
intro: Aster setiger, also known as the Hairy Mountain Aster, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is native to the mountainous regions of East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Aster setiger include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and boosting the immune system. Aster setiger can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used to treat colds, fever, and respiratory issues.
